intro.headline: Automation Engineer at Example Labs | TypeScript, Python, AI Workflows

about:
I build automation that has to hold up outside the happy path. My work tends to sit between product delivery and platform reliability, with a focus on practical developer tooling, clear observability, and systems that teams can trust in production.

I enjoy shaping ambiguous requirements into maintainable workflows, especially when the work crosses application code, quality engineering, and human-in-the-loop AI features. The common thread is reducing operational drag while keeping the experience understandable for the people using and maintaining it.

I care about thoughtful DX, incremental rollout plans, and making complex systems easier to operate. I like the work best when good tooling helps a small team move faster without giving up clarity or discipline.

experience.title: Automation Engineer
experience.description: Lead implementation of workflow automation, evaluation tooling, and operator-facing systems for AI-assisted product experiments.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Built backend services and internal tooling that improved release confidence, debugging, and day-to-day delivery for application teams.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Worked across product and platform surfaces in Node.js and frontend codebases, with a focus on developer experience and operational quality.

education.description: Focused on distributed systems, machine learning, and data-intensive application design.
Coursework included algorithms, databases, human-computer interaction, and web engineering.

certifications.name: Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer

projects.title: Workflow Evaluation Toolkit
projects.description: Designed a lightweight evaluation harness for prompt, retrieval, and regression testing across automation workflows.

projects.title: Operator Feedback Console
projects.description: Built reusable intake and review surfaces for human-in-the-loop automation with traceability and observability built in.

volunteerExperience.description: Mentor students on programming fundamentals, creative problem-solving, and collaborative software projects.
